creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kurt Jaeger from comment #7)
> (In reply to Mark Felder from comment #6)
> > Nice to see v4 is now public. I'm testing this. As maintainer of the other
> > two Unifi ports
> 
> Should unifi4 replace -2 and -3 ?
>

Unfortunately it cannot. The Unifi software also ships the firmware for the equipment it manages. There are major changes between 2 and 3 (though not so much 3 and 4) which causes problems for some users who upgrade. Also, at some point newer releases won't ship with compatible firmware for older hardware. I don't have specific examples, but it could leave some endusers stranded. It's best to keep each version around as long as Ubiquiti hasn't EoL'd it.
 
> Mark: Would you do it 8-) ?

Sure, no problem. I'll take this bug report as well.
